Ntc And Mtn To Compel
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian Smith/Seth Herring, Esq., for Appellant and moving party:Bayview Opera House, Inc.
Anne Hipshman, Esq., for Respondent and opposing party: Shelly Bell

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Appellant Bayview Opera House, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Respondent Shelley Jean Bell And To Compel Production of Documents At Deposition is granted in part and denied in part. The deposition shall proceed no later than December 4, 2008 for a period not to exceed three hours. The deposition shall be limited to (1) questions about whether Bell had the ability to pay herself her wages for the calendar month June 2007 during the calendar month July 2007; (2) questions regarding the work Bell performed for Bayview Opera house in June 2007, including, but not limited to the work performed on the Africa/Paris trip, authorizations for the trip, the source of the funds for the trip, and the funds used for expenses on the trip; and (3) questions regarding Bell's accrued unpaid vacation wages, questions regarding Bell's entitlement to vacation pay, and the accrual and use of vacation pay for 2006-2007. Plaintiff/Respondent Bell's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
